experiences.position: Tech Lead for Equities SRPL, Analyst, SWE 1
experiences.description: Leading technical development for the $1.5 million SRPL PLEX program for Equities, overhauling the EOD PLEX system and onboarding equities to the horizontal markets wide horizontal Risk and P&L platform.
achievements: Organising the work for and technically supporting the three developers working on the project
Managing prioritisation of features and delivery timelines with key stakeholders in trading, finance & the quants
Successfully delivered the agreed POC having exceeded the agreed technical scope
Implemented all bump and reval based market P&Ls for equities including spot-based predicts
Suggested and implemented a novel solution for Instrument P&L in collaboration with the quants
Collaborated with quant teams, trading and senior technologists to agree a strategic solution for corporate actions
Lead development of MCP tooling for automating JIRA interactions for developers
Part of the Equities technology AI task force, focusing on training colleagues in how to make the most of AI

experiences.description: Working in the Equities Risk and P&L team on intraday risk systems, P&L implementations, and developer tooling. Delivered a POC for a new PLEX system that secured $1.5 million in funding, became an SME on the intraday risk stack, and was seconded to PB to resolve critical performance issues.
achievements: Established as an SME on all of our intraday risk stack, consulted on the implementation of significant changes
Implemented YTD, MTD, MTM, and Late Trade P&L for the global SWAPS migration project; upgraded distribution algorithm, reducing risk latency by 50% for the AMRS SWAPS desk

Built a suite of support tools and scripts to aggregate logged data and generate graphs, reducing issue diagnosis time from over an hour to 5 minutes and providing visibility on previously unknown issues
Built strong relationships with application support and traders, routinely working with both to identify issues, then with quants to fix, test and deploy solutions
Trained junior members of the team and an intern on systems and processes

Seconded to PB intraday risk team: resolved performance issues (75% latency reduction), added Java aggregator features, and delivered risk limit breach acknowledgement workflow (TypeScript/AG Grid/React/Flask) in under two weeks

experiences.description: Placed in the Equity Linked Technology team working closely with equities traders.
achievements: Created a framework for isolating causes of inefficiency in the compute grid running intraday risk and P&L calculations
Created an automated report detailing how to amend inefficiencies in our use of the compute grid

experiences.description: Worked in the National Security business unit for law enforcement clients including CEOPs.
achievements: Created tools for generating language recognition ML models
Built automated, containerised dark web scraping tools
